title: Parallel Array Operations
impact: Use workerpool's parallel processing factory functions for bulk entity processing

stepByStep: Identify operations that are CPU-bound and process many items
candidates: Semantic similarity calculations across many entities

stepByStep: Create a shared pool or use the fuzzy search pool
Use createParallelFilter factory to create parallel filter function
Add threshold check (e.g., only parallelize for > 1000 entities)
acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate detection parallelized for large graphs
Threshold prevents overhead for small graphs

stepByStep: Import createParallelForEach or use pool.exec with chunked entities
For large entity sets, parallelize similarity calculations
acceptanceCriteria: Performance improved for large entity sets

stepByStep: Create new test file for parallel operation benchmarks
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmarks show improvement for large datasets

notes: Focus on operations that are CPU-bound and process many items. I/O-bound operations won't benefit from parallelization. Always add activation thresholds to avoid overhead for small datasets.
